log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dhampir — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 40/67
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 18/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Dhampir — Iron Concentration with Greatclub: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 10/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dhampir — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dhampir — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Dhampir — Iron Concentration.
→ Dhampir — Iron Concentration healed for 8 HP. HP: 18/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Dhampir — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Dhampir — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
